settingsCards.title: Verifactu (AEAT)
settingsCards.description: Spanish e-invoicing compliance. Manage certificate, SIF producer, submission queue and fiscal ledger.

setup.title: Setup pending
setup.description: Complete the following steps before enabling Verifactu.

inactive.title: Ready to enable
inactive.description: All configuration is complete. Enable Verifactu to start submitting invoices to AEAT.

active-test.title: Verifactu active in test
active-test.description: Invoices are submitted to the AEAT sandbox. Useful to validate the integration before going to production.

active-prod.title: Verifactu active in production
active-prod.description: Invoices are submitted as real fiscal data to AEAT. Any error is officially recorded.

setup.producer: Fill in the SIF producer details

emisor.title: Issuer data
emisor.editHint: This data comes from the clinic info. To change it, edit it there.

vatMapping.title: AEAT VAT classification
vatMapping.description: Map each catalog VAT type to its AEAT classification (S1, E1, N1…).

vatMapping.title: AEAT VAT classification
vatMapping.subtitle: Define how each catalog VAT type translates to its AEAT classification in every Verifactu record.
vatMapping.legalIntro: Leaving a row on 'Auto' uses a heuristic (rate>0 → S1, rate=0 → N1). For dental clinical services it usually makes sense to pin 'E1 — Exempt art. 20 LIVA'. Spanish clinics typically only need an override on the 'Exempt' VAT type.
vatMapping.empty: No VAT types in the clinic catalog.

environment.warningProd: You're about to switch to production. From now on, every issued invoice will be sent to AEAT as a real fiscal record.
environment.label: Environment

settings.title: Verifactu settings
settings.enableHint: When enabled, every issued invoice is automatically sent to AEAT.
settings.nifEmisorHint: The clinic NIF. Must match the certificate.

certificate.title: Digital certificate
certificate.description: Upload the clinic's FNMT certificate (.pfx / .p12). Stored encrypted.
certificate.subject: Holder
certificate.passwordHint: The password protecting the file. Never stored in cleartext.
certificate.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Upload a .pfx or .p12 file.
certificate.noActiveHint: Upload your FNMT certificate (.pfx / .p12) to enable Verifactu and sign submissions to AEAT.
certificate.dropzoneSubtitle: or click to pick a file
certificate.encryptionNote: The file and password are encrypted with the server key. Never stored in cleartext.
certificate.helpBody: To sign submissions to AEAT you need a digital certificate for the clinic, issued by FNMT. Three valid types:
certificate.helpItem1: Legal Representative Certificate — for companies (S.L., S.A.).
certificate.helpItem2: Personal Certificate — for autónomos whose NIF matches the issuer.
certificate.fnmtLink: Request certificate at the FNMT portal

records.title: Fiscal ledger
records.subtitle: Immutable history of records submitted to AEAT.

producer.title: SIF producer
producer.subtitle: Legal identification of whoever puts the software in production and signs the declaración responsable.
producer.legalIntro: RD 1007/2023 art. 13 requires the producer of the Sistema Informático de Facturación to sign a declaración responsable. If DentalPin is offered as managed SaaS, the producer is the SaaS operator. If a clinic self-hosts (autodesarrollo), the clinic itself is the producer. If an integrator deploys it, the integrator is the producer.

process.title: What you need to do
process.s1: Identify who the SIF producer is (step 1) — legal data that appears in the declaration and in every record sent to AEAT.
process.s2: Read the declaration responsable and sign it electronically (step 2). The system seals the date and the signing user as evidence.
process.s3: Download the signed PDF (step 3) for archival and, if you operate a SaaS, to distribute to your clinics.
process.legalNote: The electronic signature stored in the system is sufficient evidence for an AEAT audit. The PDF is an informational document derived from that signature.

step1.title: Producer data
step1.description: These fields legally identify the SIF producer and are embedded both in the declaración responsable and in the SistemaInformatico block of every record sent to AEAT.
step1.lockedDescription: The declaration was already signed with this data, so it is locked. Contact support to revoke the signature if you need to change it.

step2.title: Sign the declaration
step2.description: Read the text carefully. Once you are happy, tick the checkbox and click Sign electronically. The signature is sealed in the system with the date and user.

step3.title: Download signed declaration
step3.description: Printable document with the producer data and the electronic-signature stamp. Useful for internal archiving, AEAT audit, or distribution to clinics using the system.
step3.lockedHint: Available after the declaration is signed (step 2).

declaration.heading: Declaración responsable
declaration.legalRef: Sistema Informático de Facturación — Veri*Factu (RD 1007/2023, art. 13)
declaration.preamble: Pursuant to article 13 of Royal Decree 1007/2023 (RRSIF) and Order HAC/1177/2024:
declaration.identity: {name}, with NIF {nif}, acting as producer of the Sistema Informático de Facturación named DentalPin (system identifier {idSistema}, version {version}), responsibly declares that:
declaration.item1: The system meets the requirements of article 29.2.j) of Law 58/2003 (General Tributaria) and the RRSIF.
declaration.item2: The system guarantees the integrity, retention, accessibility, legibility, traceability and inalterability of invoicing records.
declaration.item3: The system implements continuous submission of records to AEAT under Veri*Factu mode.
declaration.item4: The producer commits to keep the system updated as regulations evolve.

producer.readAndAccept: I have read and accept the declaración responsable as SIF producer.
producer.signNote: Clicking the button records the signature with the date and your user. The action cannot be undone from the interface.
producer.sealedNote: Producer data is sealed as evidence for any potential AEAT audit.
producer.revokeBody: Revoking the electronic signature lets you edit producer data again. Before you continue:
producer.revokeBullet1: The current signature loses legal value as AEAT evidence.
producer.revokeBullet2: Verifactu auto-disables until you sign the new declaration.
producer.revokeBullet3: Records already submitted to AEAT are not affected — only the declared producer for future submissions changes.
producer.revokedToast: Signature revoked. You can edit the producer data now.
